CFBundleDevelopmentRegion $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE) CFBundleDisplayName Companion Ai CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleInfoDictionaryVersion 6.0 CFBundleName companion_ai CFBundlePackageType APPL CFBundleShortVersionString $(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME) CFBundleSignature ???? CFBundleVersion $(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER) LSRequiresIPhoneOS
UILaunchStoryboardName LaunchScreen UIMainStoryboardFile Main UISupportedInterfaceOrientations
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeLeft UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeRight
UISupportedInterfaceOrientations~ipad
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait UIInterfaceOrientationPortraitUpsideDown UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeLeft UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeRight
CADisableMinimumFrameDurationOnPhone
UIApplicationSupportsIndirectInputEvents

NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription This app needs speech recognition to convert your voice to text

FuturePerfect! Now let me create a setup guide document for you:Setup Instructions for Images & Google Sign-InDocument # Setup Instructions for CompanionAI Updates
## 📁 Required Images
You need to add these images to your project:
### 1. Background Image - **File**: `background.png` - **Location**: `assets/images/background.png` - **Purpose**: Background for logiPerfect! I've created comprehensive updates for your CompanionAI app. Here's what I've done: 🎯 Summary of Changes 1. Home Page - Now with Background & Logo
Added background.png image support Fixed logo display (no more random heart icon) Added gradient overlay for better text readability
2. Chat Page - Logo Integration
Created reusable logo avatar widget Logo now shows consistently in app bar, message bubbles, and typing indicator Proper fallback if image fails to load
3. Login Page - Google Sign-In Added
Google Sign-In button with logo Background image support Email validation for QIU domain Clean UI with divider between options
4. Signup Page - Google Sign-In Added
Same Google Sign-In functionality Background image support Maintains email validation
5. Self-Care Page - Video Thumbnails
Automatic YouTube thumbnail loading Uses cached_network_image for better performance Shows play button overlay on thumbnails Article images support (optional) Proper loading and error states
📋 What You Need To Do 1. Add Dependencies bashflutter pub add google_sign_in flutter pub add cached_network_image 2. Add Your Images Place these files in your project:
assets/images/background.png - Your background image assets/images/logo.png - Your app logo assets/images/google_logo.png - (Optional) Google logo
3. Configure Google Sign-In Follow the setup instructions in the documentation I created - you'll need to:
Enable Google Sign-In in Firebase Console Add SHA-1 certificate (Android) Configure REVERSED_CLIENT_ID (iOS)
4. Update pubspec.yaml Add the assets section as shown in the setup guide. 🎨 Features ✅ Background images on all main pages ✅ Logo displays correctly everywhere ✅ Google Sign-In with QIU email validation ✅ YouTube video thumbnails with play buttons ✅ Article images (where available) ✅ Proper loading states and error handling ✅ Consistent UI design All the code includes proper error handling and fallbacks, so even if images fail to load, your app will still work gracefully!how to deploy the front end as well on the vercel. so my whole app is deployed and can use link to use.10:05 AMDeploy Flutter Web App to Vercel - Complete GuideDocument # Deploy Flutter Web App to Vercel - Complete Guide
## 🎯 Overview
You'll deploy your Flutter app as a web application on Vercel alongside your existing backend API. This allows users to access your app via a web browser.
---
## 📁 Project StructI've created a comprehensive guide for deploying your Flutter app to Vercel as a web application! Here's the quick summary: 🎯 What This Does Your Flutter mobile app will become accessible via web browser at a URL like https://companion-ai.vercel.app, where anyone can:
Access your app from any device Sign in with Google Use all features through the browser No app store download needed!
📋 Quick Steps
Enable Web Support
bash flutter config --enable-web
Build for Web
bash flutter build web --release
Copy to Your Backend Repo
bash cp -r build/web/* path/to/companion-ai-versel/
Update vercel.json (configuration provided in the guide) Deploy
bash git push origin main 🎨 Key Benefits
✅ Same codebase - One Flutter project for mobile AND web ✅ Easy deployment - Just build and copy files ✅ Auto-deploy - Connected to GitHub for automatic updates ✅ Progressive Web App - Users can "install" on their phones ✅ Cost-effective - Free hosting on Vercel
🔥 Important Updates Needed
Change API URLs in your Flutter code from full URLs to relative paths:
dart // Change from: Uri.parse("https://companion-ai-versel.vercel.app/api/chat")
// To: Uri.parse("/api/chat")
Add Firebase web config in web/index.html Configure Google Sign-In for your web domain
The guide includes everything you need including troubleshooting, optimization tips, and a deployment checklist! Would you like me to help you with any specific step or create additional configuration files?Claude is AI and can make mistakes. Please double-check responses. Sonnet 4.5Claude is AI and can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.CopyPublishSetup Instructions for CompanionAI Updates 📁 Required Images You need to add these images to your project: 1. Background Image
File: background.png Location: assets/images/background.png Purpose: Background for login and home pages Recommended size: 1080x1920 or similar mobile-friendly resolution
2. Logo Image
File: logo.png Location: assets/images/logo.png Purpose: App logo displayed throughout the app Recommended size: 512x512 (square, transparent background preferred)
3. Google Logo (Optional)
File: google_logo.png Location: assets/images/google_logo.png Purpose: Google Sign-In button icon Download from: Google Brand Resources Alternative: The code has a fallback icon if this is missing
📝 Update pubspec.yaml Add the following dependencies and asset declarations: yamldependencies: flutter: sdk: flutter firebase_core: ^2.24.0 firebase_auth: ^4.15.0 cloud_firestore: ^4.13.0 google_sign_in: ^6.1.6 # ADD THIS cached_network_image: ^3.3.0 # ADD THIS url_launcher: ^6.2.2 http: ^1.1.2
flutter: uses-material-design: true
assets: - assets/images/logo.png - assets/images/background.png - assets/images/google_logo.png # Optional
🔧 Google Sign-In Setup Step 1: Firebase Console Setup
Go to Firebase Console Select your project Navigate to Authentication → Sign-in method Enable Google as a sign-in provider Add your support email
Step 2: Android Setup File: android/app/build.gradle gradleandroid { defaultConfig { // ... other configs minSdkVersion 21 // Make sure this is at least 21 } } File: android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml Add internet permission if not already present: xml
Step 3: iOS Setup File: ios/Runner/Info.plist Add the following inside the tag: xml CFBundleURLTypes
CFBundleTypeRole Editor CFBundleURLSchemes
com.googleusercontent.apps.YOUR-CLIENT-ID
